memoryArtifacts.headline: Affeton Manor / Castle, Worlington, Devonshire, England
memoryArtifacts.description:
Manor of Affeton
From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

 "Affeton Castle", the gatehouse of the former manor house of Affeton, restored to a private residence in 1868-9.
 
Affeton is a former historic manor in Devon. It was at one time also a parish with its own parish church, but was later merged into the parish of West Worlington. The manor house was almost entirely demolished in the Civil War, the only part left standing was the gatehouse, which fell into ruin. A large farmhouse known as "Affeton Barton" was soon after built over the foundations and cellars of the manor house. The ruinous gatehouse was converted in 1868-9 to a shooting box for the use of the Stucley family of Hartland Abbey and Moreton House, Bideford, and became known thereafter as "Affeton Castle".

zh.Afton, Devon, England: 英國英格蘭戴文阿福頓
zh.West Worlington, Devon, England: 英國戴文韋斯特 沃林頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Stucley於1451年3月26日之前出生在英國戴文時，他的父親Hugh Stucley53歲，母親Katherine Affeton47歲。他於大約1472年與Thomasin Cockworthy在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1488年5月27日在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.Afton, Devon, England: 英国英格兰戴文阿福頓
zh-hans.West Worlington, Devon, England: 英国戴文韋斯特 沃林頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Stucley于1451年3月26日之前出生在英国戴文时，他的父亲Hugh Stucley53岁，母亲Katherine Affeton47岁。他于大约1472年与Thomasin Cockworthy在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1488年5月27日在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Stucley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name primarily from Stukeley (Hunts), recorded as Stivecle in 1086, but occasionally from Stewkley (Bucks), recorded as Stiuecelea in 1183.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Stucley was born before 26 March 1451, in Devon, England, his father, Hugh Stucley, was 53 and his mother, Katherine Affeton, was 47. He married Thomasin Cockworthy about 1472, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 27 May 1488, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Stucley est né avant 26 mars 1451, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Stucley, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Katherine Affeton, avait 47 ans. Il a épousé Thomasin Cockworthy environ 1472, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 27 mai 1488, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Stucley vor 26. März 1451 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh Stucley 53 und seine Mutter Katherine Affeton 47. Er hat um 1472 in Devon, England Thomasin Cockworthy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 27. Mai 1488 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Stucley è nato il prima del 26 marzo 1451 nel Devon, England, il suo padre, Hugh Stucley, aveva 53 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Affeton, aveva 47 anni. Lui sposato Thomasin Cockworthy circa 1472, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 27 maggio 1488, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Stucleyが1451年3月26日以前にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Hugh Stucleyは53歳，母Katherine Affetonは47歳であった。約1472年にイギリスデボンでThomasin Cockworthyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1488年5月27日に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Stucley(이)가 1451년 3월 26일 이전 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Stucley(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Affeton(은)는 47세였다. 그는 대략 1472년 영국 데폰에서 Thomasin Cockworthy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1488년 5월 27일 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.before 26 March 1451–27 May 1488: antes 26 de março de 1451–27 de maio de 1488
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Stucley nasceu antes 26 de março de 1451, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Stucley, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Affeton, tinha 47 anos. Ele casou-se com Thomasin Cockworthy aproximadamente 1472, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 27 de maio de 1488, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Stucley родился перед 26 марта 1451 г. в местности девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh Stucley было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Katherine Affeton, 47. Он женился на женщине по имени Thomasin Cockworthy около 1472 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 27 мая 1488 г. в его родном городе.

Se casó con Thomasin Cockworthy aproximadamente 1472, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 27 de mayo de 1488, en su pueblo.
